title: DTL Gate Verdict
description: The response shape every DTL gate returns (hosted API and lite tools alike). Matches the live API at jvi3.com/api/apigate/catalog.

tool.description: Gate id from the taxonomy, e.g. 'unitgate'

status.description: Gate-specific status; maps to a verdict_class (pass/fail/refuse/malformed) via taxonomy/domains.json

passed.description: True iff status maps to verdict_class 'pass'

method.description: How the check was performed (deterministic method statement)

proof_evidence.description: Gate-specific structured evidence (e.g. lhs_dimension / rhs_dimension / reason for unitgate). Always sufficient for a human to re-derive the verdict.

certificate_hash.description: SHA-256 seal over the verdict; feed to evidencepack for replay

model_override.description: Always false: no model may override a gate verdict
